data.body:
PASS 1 review (E4 — assumption/premise verification): CLEAN, no findings.

Probed every codebase assertion in the plan via Read/Grep against the live tree; all hold:
- "B-RETIRE removed bespoke orchestrator.run_review, the ONLY producer of coverage['metrics']" — corroborated by gate_dispatch.py:124 docstring + test_plan_review.py references; run_review is now historical.
- "interpreter records a per-step duration_ms (leaf + batch finder)" — verified: interpreter.py:489,502 (_run_leaf dispatch path) and :388,396 (batch finder), threaded via executor.py:655,672-673 (_step_record).
- "gate_dispatch.produce_plan_review_verdict reconstructs coverage['metrics'] from rec.steps" — verified at gate_dispatch.py:121-171 (_attach_plan_review_metrics), invoked on BOTH the happy path (:92) and coach-failure recovery (:102).
- det_ms = precheck step — _DET_STEP_IDS={"precheck"} (:117,152).
- llm_ms = agent/batch kinds — _LLM_STEP_KINDS={"agent","batch"} (:118,154).
- total_ms measured around run_workflow — :73 (_t_total) / :88.
- llm_calls = finder criteria_count + one per succeeded agent step — :156-159,164; criteria_count produced by production_batch_runner.py:134 / runners.py:136.
- claim_path retained as the structural HMAC-verify marker matching db7b — :165.
- "tolerant of partial/untimed records (missing duration → 0, never raises)" — isinstance guard at :151.
- "sidecar carries metrics lifted to top level" — sidecar.py:141 lifts coverage['metrics'] → payload['metrics']; equality asserted by tests/unit/workflow/test_plan_review_metrics.py:108.

Affirmations (E4): (a) each codebase assertion verified by Read/Grep, not training knowledge; (b) fail-closed — no assertion was left unverifiable; (c) ANTI-FP — named implementation files (gate_dispatch.py, interpreter.py, executor.py, sidecar.py) were read directly before concluding. No E4 gaps.
